data.title: Vystar introduces ultrasoft 55 density latex mattress topper on Vytex.com store, overcoming challenges with proprietary technology.
data.description: In Worcester, MA, on July 24, 2025, Vystar Corporation unveiled its latest product, the ultrasoft 55 density natural rubber latex mattress topper. This new Vytex topper, utilizing innovative molding technology, prevents the common issues of latex foam hardening and forming multiple densities during large-scale manufacturing, amounting to a 14 ILD equivalent. Prior to this advancement, consumers were limited to experiencing the luxurious softness of 55 density latex only in smaller items like pillows and cushions.

data.title: L3Harris Q2 Earnings: Revenue $5.43B (beat), EPS $2.78 (beat), raised guidance. Year-over-year revenue up 2%.
data.description: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE: LHX) released their second-quarter financial results yesterday, surpassing expectations. They reported a total revenue of $5.43 billion, exceeding analyst predictions of $5.32 billion. The company also revealed adjusted earnings of $2.78 per share for the second quarter, outperforming estimates of $2.49 per share. Year-over-year, total revenue saw a 2% increase. Revenue figures by category were as follows: Communication Systems brought in $1.38 billion, while Integrated Missions Systems contributed $1.62 billion. For more details, the complete article is available for reading on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Genie Company renews partnership with Pro Football Hall of Fame as 'Official Garage Door Opener'.
data.description: Mount Hope, Ohio - The Pro Football Hall of Fame has officially named Genie as its exclusive garage door opener partner. The Genie Company, known for its innovative technology in this space, has extended its partnership with the Hall of Fame. This collaboration promises enhanced experiences for visitors, as Genie becomes the Official Garage Door Opener of the Pro Football Hall of Fame. The agreement, announced on July 24, 2025, marks a significant milestone, solidifying the strategic alliance between the two entities.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs gained $332.18 million on July 23, while Bitcoin ETFs faced $85.9 million outflows. BlackRock's Ethereum ETF saw $324.63 million inflows, with total assets at $19.6 billion.
data.description: On July 23, Ethereum ETFs saw a significant increase in net inflows, totaling $332.18 million, continuing a streak of fourteen consecutive days of positive flows. This trend signifies a growing inclination among institutional investors to shift from Bitcoin to Ether. Leading the pack was BlackRock's ETHA with a substantial single-day net inflow of $324.63 million, contributing to a total of $8.9 billion since its inception. In comparison, Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced net outflows of $85.9 million over three days. Data from SoSoValue indicates that Ethereum ETF net assets have now reached $19.6 billion, equivalent to approximately 4.57% of the asset's market capitalization. Major sponsors such as Grayscale, Fidelity, VanEck, and Bitwise have all played a role in these inflows. On the other hand, Bitcoin ETFs, including BlackRock's IBIT and Fidelity's FBTC, have accumulated $54.4 billion in net inflows overall, though recent trading sessions have shown a decrease in sentiment.

data.title: Trader AI launches trading robot for Canadian investors, combining AI algorithms, real-time analysis for secure, compliant trading. Key features include: AI signal generation, automated execution, user-friendly dashboard, robust risk management, transparent fee structure. Requires $250 minimum deposit, commission-free trading, compliance with regulatory standards. AI engine based on multi-layered architecture with continuous data aggregation, machine learning, signal generation, automated order execution, risk management. Registration process involves account creation, email and phone verification, demo account activation, funding options. KYC verification needed for withdrawals exceeding CAD 2,000/month. Trader AI aims to democratize cryptocurrency trading with advanced features tailored for Canadian market. Read full article on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Trader AI, a fintech platform focused on AI-powered cryptocurrency trading, has introduced a new trading robot tailored for Canadian investors. It aims to simplify trading processes without compromising security or transparency. This platform offers features such as AI-powered signal generation, fully automated execution, user-centric interface, robust risk management, transparent fee structure, and Canadian-focused compliance. With over USD 50 billion annual trading volume in the cryptocurrency market, Trader AI offers a minimum deposit of USD 250, commission-free trading, and a bilingual knowledge base for its Canadian users. Trader AI uses comprehensive market data aggregation, machine learning, signal generation scores, and automated order execution for efficient trading. The platform also provides a user-friendly registration process, demo account activation, minimum deposit requirements, funding options, and optional KYC verification for withdrawals exceeding CAD 2,000 per month. By leveraging AI and sophisticated trading algorithms, Trader AI aims to democratize crypto trading for Canadians and simplify the process of cryptocurrency investment.

data.title: DESOTEC enters Houston, offering rapid, adaptable, eco-friendly filtration solutions for Gulf Coast industries.
data.description: The recent announcement stated that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, showing an improvement from the previous month. This positive trend has resulted in the creation of over 250,000 new jobs, with the majority of employment opportunities coming from the tech and healthcare sectors. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 3.5% compared to last year. These statistics indicate a strengthening labor market and provide hope for continued economic growth in the upcoming months.

data.title: Dispatch Science launches DataBridge, cloud-native iPaaS, streamlining carrier integration with shippers, cutting costs and saving time.
data.description: A company called Dispatch Science, based in Montreal, has introduced a new product named DataBridge. This cloud-native integration platform as a service (iPaaS) is designed to facilitate logistics and delivery management. DataBridge aims to eliminate the technical and financial obstacles that frequently hinder carriers from collaborating with new shippers. By transforming complex and costly integration projects into efficient and scalable procedures, carriers can independently manage and expand without the need for extensive IT support.

data.title: NTT DATA names Beth Howen President of State, Local and Education business in North America, bringing wealth of experience.
data.description: Plano, Texas-based NTT DATA has appointed Beth Howen as the new President of its State and Local Government and Education (SLED) division in North America. With a background encompassing key roles at Capgemini, Telus International, Atos, and the City of Indianapolis, Beth is a seasoned digital and operations executive known for her dynamic and results-oriented approach. This move underscores NTT DATA's commitment to bolstering its presence in the SLED sector, leveraging Beth's extensive experience to drive growth and innovation in this critical market segment.

data.title: Honeywell beats Q2 2025 expectations, reports $10.35B revenue, raises outlook on earnings and sales, drives transformation.
data.description: Honeywell International Inc. reported their second-quarter 2025 results, with adjusted earnings of $2.75 per share, beating analysts' expectations of $2.65. Revenue for the quarter was $10.35 billion, up 8% from the previous year and surpassing expectations of $10.02 billion. Net income on a GAAP basis was $2.45 per share, a 4% increase from the prior-year period. Operating income rose 7% and segment profit increased 8% to $2.4 billion. Operating margin contracted to 20.4%, while segment margin contracted to 22.9%. Operating cash flow was $1.3 billion, down 4% year over year, and free cash flow was $1.0 billion, down 9% year over year. Aerospace Technologies generated $4.31 billion in sales with a 6% organic growth, while Building Automation had $1.83 billion in sales with 8% organic growth.

data.title: Clover x Shark Tank Summit in Las Vegas on September 28-30 will host entrepreneurs, offering guidance for success.
data.description: Las Vegas--Clover and Sony Pictures Television (SPT) have revealed details about the inaugural Clover x Shark Tank Summit to be held in Las Vegas from September 28-30, 2025. The event will feature a comprehensive line-up of speakers and programs aimed at providing entrepreneurs with the motivation and knowledge necessary for success. Clover, known as the world's most intelligent all-in-one point-of-sale system, has teamed up with SPT, the producer of the award-winning show "Shark Tank," to host the summit. This live event will offer attendees valuable insights and guidance from industry experts over the course of several days.
